active_cycle.goal: Prepare the repository for real smart-home evidence execution while preserving sample-vs-real and production-claim boundaries.

allowed_work: Preserve the merged task result and queue history.
forbidden_work: Do not claim real evidence or run the real pilot.
acceptance_criteria: Task is recorded as completed with boundary notes.

critique_findings: Completed history is preserved as terminal queue state.
completion.boundary: No real evidence was claimed, no real pilot was run, and Issue #8 remains evidence-pending unless explicitly validated otherwise.

tasks.title: Add submitted readiness status contract check
tasks.objective: Completed bounded queue task: Add submitted readiness status contract check.
allowed_work: Preserve the merged task result and queue history.
forbidden_work: Do not claim real evidence or run the real pilot.
acceptance_criteria: Task is recorded as completed with boundary notes.

critique_findings: Submitted readiness authorization must remain shadow-mode only and non-real origins cannot authorize pilot start.
completion.boundary: No submitted evidence was created, no real pilot was run, and no production/release/export/live-render/accessibility validation was claimed.

tasks.title: Add Issue #8 submitted-packet absence check
tasks.objective: Add a bounded check that Issue #8 evidence-pending state cannot be interpreted as a real submitted packet.
allowed_work: Add a focused validator for absent submitted packet state.
Assert Issue #8 checklist/prose alone cannot satisfy real_issue_submission.
Keep queue and STATUS synchronized.
forbidden_work: Do not scrape or fabricate Issue #8 attachments.
Do not create a submitted packet.
Do not run the real pilot.
acceptance_criteria: Issue #8 evidence-pending state remains a blocker.
No text-only issue content is treated as a real packet.
CI continues to pass without real evidence execution.

critique_findings: Issue #8 has an evidence-pending checklist and draft packet status, but no machine-checkable submitted packet.
The check must stay local and declarative; it must not scrape attachments or manufacture evidence from issue prose.
Absence of a submitted packet must keep real pilot authorization blocked.
completion.boundary: No Issue #8 prose, checklist, or labels were treated as a real submitted packet; no submitted evidence was created; no real pilot was run.

tasks.title: Refresh rolling queue after submitted-readiness safety set
tasks.objective: Audit RQ-0011 through RQ-0014, preserve completed history, reprioritize blockers, and write the next four bounded tasks.
allowed_work: Review merged PRs and CI outcomes for RQ-0011 through RQ-0014.
Carry forward unresolved blockers without hiding partial work.
Add the next four pending tasks and the following queue-refresh task.
forbidden_work: Do not schedule real pilot execution unless real evidence and readiness pass.
Do not remove sample-vs-real boundaries.
Do not mark validator work complete without merged evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Every fifth task remains queue_refresh.
At least four pending executable tasks remain after refresh unless blocked on evidence.
Completed task history and blockers are preserved.

critique_findings: RQ-0011 through RQ-0014 were merged or synchronized, but Issue #8 remains open with evidence-pending labels and no machine-checkable submitted packet.
The next work must keep submitted-readiness guards in validator/documentation scope and must not schedule the real pilot.
A fourth executable pending task and the next fifth-position queue refresh are required to preserve the rolling cadence.
completion.boundary: No submitted packet was created, no real evidence was inferred, no real pilot was run, and no production/release/export/live-render/accessibility validation was claimed.

tasks.title: Add privacy-review submitted packet guard
tasks.objective: Add a bounded check that a real submitted packet cannot pass submitted-mode readiness unless the privacy review fields are explicit and complete.
allowed_work: Add a focused validator assertion or fixture for submitted packet privacy-review completeness.
Document that absent privacy review keeps the real pilot blocked.
Keep sample-vs-real and Issue #8 evidence-pending boundaries unchanged.
forbidden_work: Do not create or infer submitted evidence.
Do not scrape private attachments from Issue #8.
Do not run the real pilot or mark privacy review complete without evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Submitted-mode readiness requires explicit privacy-review completion before pilot authorization.
Missing privacy review remains a blocker.
CI continues to pass without real evidence execution.

tasks.title: Add submitted packet evidence-completeness contract check
tasks.objective: Add a bounded check that submitted-mode readiness cannot pass unless evidence_complete_definition and intake_verdict remain mutually consistent for a real_issue_submission packet.
allowed_work: Add a focused validator assertion or documentation check for submitted evidence-completeness consistency.
Keep the real pilot blocked when required evidence is absent or inconsistent.
Preserve sample-vs-real and production-claim boundaries.
forbidden_work: Do not create or infer submitted evidence.
Do not run the real pilot.
Do not treat completeness flags as visual/export/accessibility validation evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Submitted-mode readiness fails when evidence_complete_definition is incomplete but intake_verdict attempts to allow pilot start.
Completeness consistency does not imply production, export, live-render, or accessibility validation.
CI continues to pass without real evidence execution.

tasks.title: Add Issue #8 label-state consistency check
tasks.objective: Add a bounded check that evidence-pending labels and open issue status remain consistent with real_submitted_packet_present=false until a validated packet exists.
allowed_work: Add a focused validator or documentation check.
Keep sample-vs-real and Issue #8 evidence-pending boundaries unchanged.
Keep queue and STATUS synchronized.
forbidden_work: Do not create or infer submitted evidence.
Do not run the real pilot.
Do not claim production, export, live-render, or accessibility validation.
acceptance_criteria: CI continues to pass without real evidence execution.
Real pilot remains blocked unless real submitted packet and readiness pass exist.
Issue label state cannot contradict submitted-packet absence.

tasks.title: Add submitted packet source-kind lock check
tasks.objective: Add a bounded check that submitted-mode readiness only treats source_kind=real_issue_submission as potentially pilot-eligible when all other gates pass.
allowed_work: Add a focused validator assertion or documentation check for submitted packet source_kind.
Ensure sample/default/template/placeholder source kinds remain pilot-ineligible.
Keep Issue #8 evidence-pending and sample-vs-real boundaries unchanged.
forbidden_work: Do not create or infer submitted evidence.
Do not run the real pilot.
Do not use source_kind alone as production, export, live-render, or accessibility evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Non-real source_kind values cannot authorize pilot start.
real_issue_submission remains necessary but not sufficient for pilot authorization.
CI continues to pass without real evidence execution.

tasks.title: Refresh rolling queue after submitted-packet guard set
tasks.objective: Audit RQ-0016 through RQ-0019, preserve completed history, reprioritize Issue #8 blockers, and write the next bounded tasks.
allowed_work: Review merged PRs and CI outcomes for RQ-0016 through RQ-0019.
Carry forward Issue #8 evidence-pending and submitted-packet blockers unless a real validated packet exists.
Maintain at least four pending executable tasks after refresh.
forbidden_work: Do not schedule real pilot execution unless real evidence and readiness pass.
Do not remove source-kind, privacy, completeness, or label-state guards.
Do not claim production, export, live-render, or accessibility validation.
acceptance_criteria: Every fifth task remains queue_refresh.
Completed task history and blockers are preserved.
The next queue contains bounded safe work and does not hide missing real evidence.
